meaning: Kemal 穆斯塔法·基马尔(即 Kemal Ataturk)
examples: Mustafa can speak, but he repeats himself a lot.
Accepting Mustafa helped me accept myself again.
Shoe store employee Mustafa Shaaban held up a sign calling for more rights.
After he leaves, Mustafa reappears, accompanied by Taddeo as his bodyguard, dressed in Turkish clothes.
In her apartment, Isabella gets ready for the ceremony granting Mustafa his Pappataci status.
